title: hieracium murorum subsp. haegerstroemii
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. haegerstroemii, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. haegerstroemii lie in its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, with potential uses in treating various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. haegerstroemii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
